cases.prompt_body: Documentary tower-console warning shot, one lone technical worker at a compact side console inside launch steel, preserve native human scale and console proportions, the background beyond the operator is only the orange external tank surface from upper-middle section, no visible booster, no visible sky, no visible bottom of tank, no exterior catwalk or platform behind him, no outside tower lattice, operator and console anchored to the right side, cold prelaunch air, procedural stillness
